---
title: "DEDALUS"
---

**Dedalus** project consists in the upgrade of a classic cartesian 3D printer into a 5DoFs 3D printer. This upgrade helps to overcome the classic limitations of FDM, exploiting non-planar printing.

Documentation outline:

* [Overview & Design Choices](design_choices.qmd)
* [Hardware](boards.qmd)
* [Digital Twin](modeling.qmd)
* [Motion & Integration](motion.qmd)
